draft_hit_rate_z.what: Percentage of draft picks who started 2+ NFL seasons
draft_hit_rate_z.how: Hits / total picks, excluding picks from last 2 years (not enough dev time)
draft_hit_rate_z.limits: Doesn't distinguish starter quality. Plug-and-play OL counts same as All-Pro.

day3_gem_rate_z.how: Same threshold as draft hit rate, restricted to rounds 4-7.
day3_gem_rate_z.limits: Specialists like kickers/punters count alongside starters.

first_round_success_z.what: Career AV of first-round picks vs historical expectation for their slot
first_round_success_z.how: Actual weighted approximate value minus historical average AV for that pick number.
first_round_success_z.limits: Career AV understated for recent picks. Penalizes GMs whose R1 picks are in year 1-3.

fa_hit_rate_z.what: Percentage of FA signings who played 12+ games in year 1
fa_hit_rate_z.how: FA signings = contracts where player was on a different team in year Y-1. Hit = games played >= 12 in signing year.
fa_hit_rate_z.limits: Games played is a blunt proxy for quality. Replacement-level healthy beats injured star.

fa_value_efficiency_z.what: FA hits per $10M of APY spent
fa_value_efficiency_z.how: Total hits / (total APY in $M / 10). A GM with 3 hits on $30M APY scores 1.0.
fa_value_efficiency_z.limits: Treats all hits equally. Pro Bowler for $20M/yr = backup for $2M/yr.

trade_surplus_z.what: Draft pick value received minus given via trade, Jimmy Johnson chart
trade_surplus_z.how: Sum of pick values received minus sum of pick values given across all trades in tenure.
trade_surplus_z.limits: JJ chart overvalues top picks. Ignores players-for-picks trades.

trade_activity_z.what: Distinct trades per season as GM
trade_activity_z.how: Unique trade_ids where this GM was on either side, divided by seasons.
trade_activity_z.limits: Pure count. High activity != skill. Pair with trade_surplus to interpret.

core_retention_z.what: Percentage of own draft picks re-signed to second contract
core_retention_z.how: Of picks made 2013-2020 (enough time for rookie deal to expire), % re-signed by same GM.
core_retention_z.limits: Penalizes GMs who drafted busts. Doesn't account for picks who left because team chose not to pay.

udfa_hit_rate_z.what: UDFAs who stuck on the roster 2+ years
udfa_hit_rate_z.how: UDFAs = rookie contract holders NOT in draft picks table. Hit = played 1+ games in signing year AND year+1.
udfa_hit_rate_z.limits: Small sample for most GMs. One or two hits swing the rate dramatically.
